title: Broke after a week
text: These earbuds broke after one week of normal use. The right ear stopped working completely. I returned it and asked for a refund. Customer service was unresponsive and never replied to my emails.

title: Battery drains fast
text: The battery doesn't last more than two hours on a single charge. For the price point, this is too expensive compared to what I get. The pairing instructions are unclear and the manual was missing pages.

title: Love this speaker
text: I absolutely love this speaker. Switched from BrandX Echo Mini and the sound is much better than my old one. After 4 months of daily use it still works perfectly. Would recommend again to anyone looking for a kitchen speaker.

title: Worth every penny
text: Worth every penny. I use this for long flights and the noise cancelling is solid. Used daily for months and the build feels well-made and sturdy. Great value for the price.

title: Caught fire while charging
text: Sparked and caught fire while charging overnight. This is dangerous and unsafe. I am very concerned about the safety of this product. Returned immediately.

title: Privacy concerns
text: This thing tracks me and listens to me in my home. Privacy issues are a real concern. I don't trust where my data goes. Sells my data to advertisers in my opinion.

title: Solid backup battery
text: Great for camping trips and emergency power. I use this for keeping the kids tablets charged on road trips. Holds up after months of being thrown in the car.

title: Mixed feelings
text: Sound is decent but feels cheap and plasticky compared to what I expected. Hard to set up the touch controls. Not a game changer but not a complete failure either.

title: ALL CAPS YELLING
text: THIS IS THE BEST THING I HAVE EVER BOUGHT EVER AND I CANNOT BELIEVE IT WORKS THIS WELL!!! BUY IT NOW DO NOT WAIT!!!
